text.title: jobs-to-be-done Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for jobs-to-be-done as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Asking "what features do you want?" instead of "what are you trying to accomplish?"
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Feature requests describe a solution hypothesis; job discovery requires understanding the progress the customer is trying to make, which is often different from what they explicitly request.

failure-mode.description: Building one job statement for all customers when different segments hire the product for different jobs.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: A single product can be hired for multiple distinct jobs; conflating them into one statement produces positioning that speaks clearly to nobody.
